texts.label: text
texts.orig: Dear Team,
texts.text: Dear Team,

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Villa Luxury Suites Hotel is only 15 minutes away from the sun-kissed shoreline.
texts.text: The Villa Luxury Suites Hotel is only 15 minutes away from the sun-kissed shoreline.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We have variety of accommodation options to suit the needs of individual travelers, families and groups of friends. The rooms have modern furnishings and amenities fused with the distinctive Swahili architectural style. If you prefer a quiet holiday, with occasional beach walks, the Villa Luxury Suites Hotel is perfect. It has recreational facilities like a swimming pool; a private pool in the family suite.
texts.text: We have variety of accommodation options to suit the needs of individual travelers, families and groups of friends. The rooms have modern furnishings and amenities fused with the distinctive Swahili architectural style. If you prefer a quiet holiday, with occasional beach walks, the Villa Luxury Suites Hotel is perfect. It has recreational facilities like a swimming pool; a private pool in the family suite.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Honeymoon or romantic holiday needs a comfortable suite like the junior suite with its own pool. It's a spacious suite that has its own privacy.
texts.text: Honeymoon or romantic holiday needs a comfortable suite like the junior suite with its own pool. It's a spacious suite that has its own privacy.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We make every day at The Villa Luxury Suites Hotel memorable. Wine and dine within the hotel; no need to worry about your meals when we host. Our restaurant overlooks the garden and the pool, just the right spot to enjoy sumptuous food without missing out on the beauty of the location. In addition, there's free Wi-Fi. Catch up with friends and family while on holiday and never miss out on important events such as their birthdays and anniversaries.
texts.text: We make every day at The Villa Luxury Suites Hotel memorable. Wine and dine within the hotel; no need to worry about your meals when we host. Our restaurant overlooks the garden and the pool, just the right spot to enjoy sumptuous food without missing out on the beauty of the location. In addition, there's free Wi-Fi. Catch up with friends and family while on holiday and never miss out on important events such as their birthdays and anniversaries.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Indeed, it is a home away from home. The staff makes this one of the top villas in Diani for its hospitality. You, and your friends or family members, will enjoy the experience.
texts.text: Indeed, it is a home away from home. The staff makes this one of the top villas in Diani for its hospitality. You, and your friends or family members, will enjoy the experience.

texts.text:  Bed & breakfast- (BB)- Breakfast is  included, but lunch & dinner can be ordered at the restaurant on alar carte basis

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Half-board (HB) - breakfast included with a choice of either (lunch or dinner) exclusive of beverages and a three course set menu is prepared by our CHEF on a daily basis depending on the individual dietary.
